mapper.select: SELECT l.*, u.name AS user_name FROM emp_leave_record l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON l.user_id = u.id
SELECT l.*, u.name AS user_name FROM emp_leave_record l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON l.user_id = u.id WHERE l.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp_leave_record (user_id, create_time, leave_start_time, leave_end_time, leave_reason, leave_type_code, approve_user_id, approve_time, approve_content, status, real_end_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{createTime}, #{leaveStartTime}, #{leaveEndTime}, #{leaveReason}, #{leaveTypeCode}, #{approveUserId}, #{approveTime}, #{approveContent}, #{status}, #{realEndTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp_leave_record SET approve_user_id = NULL WHERE approve_user_id = #{userId}
